name: snarl-sopi-backend
description: Snarl & Sopi operator backend — v4.82: dashboard top stats now 2x2 (was 1x4 whitespace); Machines tab gets an operator filter dropdown (ag_admin); operator + machine dropdowns sorted alphabetically; restock pill in Machines overview now alert-red; design-kiosk-screen button moved on top of the bays & layout grid; added /api/v1/debug/orders diagnostic to trace the empty revenue chart. (Sync-all from Weimi already existed on the Machines tab.)
